creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Daniel, here's the status of this port.

1) Despite this PR on 17 May, eadler reset the port (no maintainer) on 26 May.  He probably didn't know about this PR.

2) On 25 May, miwi@ asked for stage support in addition.  Nothing has been submitted so far

3) As a result, the port would have been reset for not being staged

4) Right now the port is on a path to be removed completely due to lack of staging.  If you still care about, you should probably take action ASAP
